title: Networking Interview Questions
subtitle: *Mạng máy tính — OSI, TCP/IP, HTTP, DNS, Security và Backend*

sections.name: Phần I — OSI Model, TCP/IP, Cơ Bản (Q1–20)

blocks.text: OSI (Open Systems Interconnection) Model là framework 7 tầng mô tả cách dữ liệu di chuyển qua network. Mỗi tầng có trách nhiệm cụ thể.

OSI Model (Data flow: Sender -> Receiver):

  Layer 7: Application    HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SMTP, DNS, WebSocket

  Layer 6: Presentation  Encryption, Compression, Encoding (SSL/TLS)

  Layer 5: Session       Session management, Authentication

  Layer 4: Transport     TCP (reliable), UDP (fast), Port numbers

  Layer 3: Network       IP addressing, Routing (Router)

  Layer 2: Data Link     MAC address, Frames, Error detection (Switch)

  Layer 1: Physical      Bits, Cables, WiFi, Hubs

  Mnemonic: 'All People Seem To Need Data Processing'

  Encapsulation (Sender, top -> down):

    Data -> Segment -> Packet -> Frame -> Bits

  Decapsulation (Receiver, bottom -> up):

    Bits -> Frame -> Packet -> Segment -> Data

*💡 Câu hỏi hay: **'**HTTP hoạt động ở tầng nào?**'** — Layer 7 (Application). TLS/SSL: Layer 6. IP: Layer 3. TCP: Layer 4.*

questions.q: TCP/IP Model khác OSI Model thế nào?

rows: HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, SMTP, DNS, SSH, WebSocket

blocks.text:
So sanh:

  OSI:     [7][6][5] | [4] | [3] | [2][1]

  TCP/IP:  [Application] | [Transport] | [Internet] | [Network Access]

TCP/IP la practical model duoc dung thuc te.

OSI la reference model de giao tiep va hoc tap.

TCP 3-Way Handshake:

  Client                    Server

    |  ------ SYN -------->  |   (I want to connect, seq=x)

    |  <--- SYN+ACK -------  |   (OK, seq=y, ack=x+1)

    |  ------ ACK -------->  |   (Got it, ack=y+1)

    |  [Connection Established]

    |  ------ DATA ------->  |

    |  <------ ACK --------  |

TCP 4-Way Termination:

    |  ------ FIN -------->  |   (I'm done sending)

    |  <------ ACK --------  |

    |  <------ FIN --------  |   (I'm done too)

    |  ------ ACK -------->  |

    [Connection Closed - TIME_WAIT]

Private IP Ranges (RFC 1918):

  Class A: 10.0.0.0     - 10.255.255.255  (/8)

  Class B: 172.16.0.0  - 172.31.255.255  (/12)

  Class C: 192.168.0.0 - 192.168.255.255 (/16)

Special addresses:

  127.0.0.1    = localhost (loopback)

  0.0.0.0      = all interfaces (bind)

  255.255.255.255 = broadcast

  169.254.x.x  = link-local (APIPA, no DHCP)
Subnet mask phân biệt phần network và phần host của IP address. CIDR (Classless Inter-Domain Routing) biểu diễn subnet mask bằng prefix length.

CIDR examples:

  192.168.1.0/24:

    Network: 192.168.1.0

    Hosts:   192.168.1.1 - 192.168.1.254 (254 hosts)

    Broadcast: 192.168.1.255

    Mask:    255.255.255.0

  10.0.0.0/8:   16,777,214 hosts

  172.16.0.0/12:  1,048,574 hosts

  192.168.0.0/16:   65,534 hosts

  /30 = 255.255.255.252 = 2 usable hosts (point-to-point)

  /32 = single host (route to one IP)

  Useful formula: 2^(32-prefix) - 2 = usable hosts
DNS dịch hostname sang IP address. Hệ thống phân cấp (hierarchical), được cache ở nhiều cấp.

DNS Resolution (iterative):

  Browser                Recursive Resolver

    |                         |

    +-- query: api.example.com -->

                               |-- Root Server (.)

                               |   '-> NS for .com: a.gtld-servers.net

                               |

                               |-- .com TLD server

                               |   '-> NS for example.com: ns1.example.com

                               |

                               |-- ns1.example.com (Authoritative)

                               |   '-> A record: 93.184.216.34

                               |

                          93.184.216.34

    <-- IP: 93.184.216.34 ------+

DNS Record Types:

  A     -> IPv4 address (example.com -> 1.2.3.4)

  AAAA  -> IPv6 address

  CNAME -> Alias (www -> example.com)

  MX    -> Mail server

  TXT   -> Text (SPF, DKIM, verification)

  NS    -> Nameserver

  PTR   -> Reverse DNS (IP -> hostname)

  SRV   -> Service location (used by Kubernetes)

*💡 DNS port 53. TCP cho zone transfers (large responses). UDP cho queries (**<**=512 bytes, modern: **<**=4096 bytes EDNS0). TTL quyết định bao lâu cache.*

questions.q: HTTP là gì? HTTP/1.1 vs HTTP/2 vs HTTP/3?

blocks.text: HTTP (HyperText Transfer Protocol) là protocol lớp Application để truyền dữ liệu qua web. Stateless, request-response model.

HTTP/1.1 Head-of-line blocking:

  Request 1 -> [WAITING 200ms] -> Response

  Request 2 ->              [WAITING for R1] -> Response

HTTP/2 Multiplexing (same TCP connection):

  Stream 1 -> [Frame][Frame]------->[Frame]

  Stream 2 -> [Frame]--->[Frame]

  Stream 3 ->     [Frame][Frame]

HTTP/3 (QUIC over UDP):

  - Eliminates TCP HOL blocking

  - Built-in TLS 1.3

  - 0-RTT connection (reconnect instantly)

  - Connection migration (change IP, stay connected)

rows: Như GET nhưng chỉ trả headers
CORS preflight, xem methods hỗ trợ
400 Bad Request, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found, 409 Conflict, 422 Unprocessable, 429 Too Many Requests
500 Internal Server Error, 502 Bad Gateway, 503 Service Unavailable, 504 Gateway Timeout

blocks.text: HTTPS = HTTP + TLS (Transport Layer Security). Mã hóa dữ liệu giữa client và server. Port 443.

TLS 1.3 Handshake (1-RTT):

  Client                              Server

    |  --- ClientHello ------------>  |

    |  (supported ciphers, key share) |

    |                                 |

    |  <-- ServerHello + Finished --  |

    |  (chosen cipher, key share,     |

    |   certificate, server finished) |

    |                                 |

    |  --- Finished + HTTP GET ---->  |   <- encrypted!

    |  <-- HTTP Response ------------  |

TLS 1.3 vs TLS 1.2:

  TLS 1.3: 1-RTT (vs 2-RTT)

  TLS 1.3: 0-RTT resumption

  TLS 1.3: Forward secrecy by default

  TLS 1.3: Fewer cipher suites (stronger)

Certificate chain:

  Browser trusts Root CA

  Root CA signs Intermediate CA

  Intermediate CA signs Server Cert

  Server presents Cert chain

*📌 mTLS (Mutual TLS): cả client và server xác thực nhau qua certificates. Dùng trong microservices (service mesh: Istio).*

questions.q: WebSocket là gì? Khác HTTP thế nào?

blocks.text: WebSocket cung cấp full-duplex, persistent connection giữa client và server. Cả 2 có thể gửi message bất kỳ lúc.

WebSocket Handshake (HTTP Upgrade):

  Client: GET /chat HTTP/1.1

           Upgrade: websocket

           Connection: Upgrade

           Sec-WebSocket-Key: x3JJHMbDL1EzLkh9GBhXDw==

  Server: HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols

           Upgrade: websocket

           Connection: Upgrade

           Sec-WebSocket-Accept: HSmrc0sMlYUkAGmm5OPpG2HaGWk=

  // Now bidirectional frames, no HTTP overhead

questions.q: Load Balancing là gì? Các algorithms?

blocks.text: Load balancer phân phối traffic đến nhiều servers để tăng availability và performance.

rows: Lần lượt từng server theo thứ tự
Gửi tới server ít connections nhất

blocks.text:
Layer 4 vs Layer 7 Load Balancing:

  L4 (Transport):

    - Route based on IP + port

    - TCP/UDP level

    - Fast, no content inspection

    - Examples: AWS NLB, HAProxy L4

  L7 (Application):

    - Route based on HTTP headers, URL, cookies

    - Content-aware routing

    - Slower but smarter

    - Examples: AWS ALB, NGINX, Traefik
NAT dịch private IP addresses sang public IP khi packets rời mạng nội bộ. Giải quyết vấn đề thiếu IPv4 addresses.

NAT operation:

  Private Network:          Internet:

  192.168.1.10:5000 -->  Router:12.34.56.78:49152 --> Server:80

  192.168.1.11:5001 -->  Router:12.34.56.78:49153 --> Server:80

  NAT Table:

  | Private IP:Port   | Public IP:Port        |

  | 192.168.1.10:5000 | 12.34.56.78:49152     |

  | 192.168.1.11:5001 | 12.34.56.78:49153     |

Types:

  Static NAT:  1 private IP <-> 1 public IP

  Dynamic NAT: Pool of public IPs

  PAT (NAPT):  Many private IPs -> 1 public (port-based) <- most common

rows: Phát hiện attack, chỉ cảnh báo

blocks.text:
Zone-based Firewall:

  Internet Zone (untrusted)

       |

  [Firewall: default deny]

       |

  DMZ Zone (semi-trusted): Web servers, APIs

       |

  [Firewall: strict rules]

       |

  Internal Zone (trusted): Databases, internal services

  Rules: Internet -> DMZ: allow 80, 443

         DMZ -> Internal: allow 5432 (PostgreSQL)

         Internal -> Internet: allow (outbound)
VPN tạo kết nối bảo mật qua public network bằng cách đóng gói và mã hóa traffic trong một tunnel.
💡 IPSec Tunnel Mode: toàn bộ IP packet được đóng gói trong packet mới. Transport Mode: chỉ payload được encrypt. Tunnel mode được dùng phổ biến hơn.

rows: Thông tin chỉ accessible bởi authorized
Dữ liệu không bị thay đổi unauthorized
An toàn (public key chia sẻ tự do)

blocks.text:
TLS uses BOTH:

  1. Asymmetric (RSA/ECDH): key exchange + authentication

  2. Symmetric (AES): bulk data encryption

  Why? Asymmetric is secure but slow.

  -> Use asymmetric to securely exchange a symmetric key

  -> Then use fast symmetric key for the actual data

Digital Signature process:

  Signing (Sender):

    Message -> Hash (SHA-256) -> [Encrypt with PRIVATE key] -> Signature

  Verification (Receiver):

    Signature -> [Decrypt with PUBLIC key] -> Hash1

    Message -> Hash (SHA-256) -> Hash2

    Hash1 == Hash2? -> Valid signature

X.509 Certificate:

  - Subject: who it belongs to (example.com)

  - Issuer: who signed it (Let's Encrypt)

  - Public key: subject's public key

  - Validity: not before, not after

  - Signature: issuer's digital signature

Certificate Pinning:

  App hardcodes expected certificate/public key

  Prevents MITM even with rogue CAs
ARP giải quyết IP address sang MAC address trong local network (Layer 2).

ARP operation:

  PC1 (192.168.1.10) wants to send to PC2 (192.168.1.20)

  PC1 knows PC2's IP but not MAC address

  1. PC1 broadcasts: 'Who has 192.168.1.20? Tell 192.168.1.10'

     Destination MAC: FF:FF:FF:FF:FF:FF (broadcast)

  2. PC2 replies: 'I am 192.168.1.20, my MAC is AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF'

     (unicast reply)

  3. PC1 caches: 192.168.1.20 -> AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF (ARP cache)

ARP Poisoning (MITM attack):

  Attacker sends fake ARP replies

  Victims cache attacker's MAC for gateway IP

  All traffic goes through attacker

questions.q: DHCP hoạt động như thế nào?

blocks.text: DHCP (Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol) tự động cấu hình IP address, subnet mask, gateway, DNS cho devices khi join network.

DHCP DORA process:

  Client          DHCP Server

    |  DISCOVER -->  |  broadcast: 'Anyone have an IP for me?'

    |  <-- OFFER ---  |  'I offer 192.168.1.100, valid 24h'

    |  REQUEST  -->   |  'I'll take 192.168.1.100'

    |  <-- ACK  ----  |  'It's yours! DNS: 8.8.8.8, GW: 192.168.1.1'

DHCP lease:

  - Lease time: how long IP is valid

  - Renewal: at T/2, client renews with server

  - Rebinding: at 7T/8, try any DHCP server

  - Expiry: if not renewed, IP returned to pool

sections.name: Phần II — Routing, Switching, Advanced Protocols (Q21–40)

rows: Bộ nhớ đủ frame, kiểm tra, rồi forward
Bắt đầu forward khi đọc MAC đích

blocks.text: VLAN phân đoạn mạng logic trên cùng physical infrastructure. Tăng bảo mật và giảm broadcast domain.

VLAN example:

  Physical: 1 switch, 24 ports

  Logical:

    VLAN 10 (Engineering): ports 1-8

    VLAN 20 (Finance):     ports 9-16

    VLAN 30 (HR):          ports 17-24

  Traffic trong VLAN 10 KHONG the den VLAN 20

  Can router hoac L3 switch de route giua VLANs

  Trunk link: carry multiple VLANs (802.1Q tagging)

  Access link: single VLAN per port
ICMP là protocol gửi thông báo lỗi và operational messages trong IP network.

Common ICMP types:

  Type 0:  Echo Reply  (ping response)

  Type 3:  Destination Unreachable

  Type 8:  Echo Request (ping)

  Type 11: Time Exceeded (TTL expired -> traceroute)

ping command (ICMP Echo):

  ping google.com

  PING google.com (142.250.185.14): 56 bytes

  64 bytes from 142.250.185.14: icmp_seq=1 ttl=117 time=10.5 ms

traceroute/tracert (uses TTL increment):

  traceroute google.com

  1  192.168.1.1    (gateway)     1.2 ms

  2  10.10.1.1     (ISP router)  5.4 ms

  3  ...

  10 142.250.185.14 (google)    10.5 ms
CDN là mạng lưới servers phân tán địa lý, serve content từ location gần user nhất. Giảm latency, tăng performance.

CDN operation:

  User in HCM                  CDN PoP (Point of Presence)

  requests image.jpg   --->   Singapore PoP (50ms)

                          instead of: US Origin (300ms)

  Cache Miss:  PoP -> Origin Server -> cache -> serve

  Cache Hit:   PoP serves from cache directly

CDN benefits:

  - Reduce latency (serve from nearest PoP)

  - Reduce origin load (cache static assets)

  - DDoS protection (absorb attack traffic)

  - High availability (failover between PoPs)

Content types:

  Static:  images, CSS, JS, videos (cache for days/weeks)

  Dynamic: API responses (cache with short TTL or bypass)

Examples: Cloudflare, AWS CloudFront, Fastly, Akamai

rows: Dữ liệu tối đa có thể truyền (capacity)
Thời gian từ A đến B và quay lại
Dữ liệu thực tế truyền được

blocks.text:
Goodput vs Throughput:

  Throughput: total bytes received (including overhead)

  Goodput:    actual useful payload data

Latency components:

  Propagation delay: distance / speed of light

  Transmission delay: packet_size / bandwidth

  Processing delay:  router CPU time

  Queuing delay:     waiting in buffer

Bandwidth-Delay Product (BDP):

  BDP = Bandwidth * RTT

  = amount of data 'in flight' at any moment

  100Mbps * 100ms = 10MB in flight
Piggybacking là kỹ thuẫt kết hợp data và acknowledgment trong cùng frame khi truyền 2 chiều. Tiết kiệm bandwidth.

rows: Chia thời gian cho mỗi user
Chia tần số cho mỗi user
Chia bước sóng cho mỗi user

questions.q: Network Devices: Hub, Switch, Router, Gateway?

blocks.text: Transparent bridge tự động xây dựng và cập nhật routing table bằng cách học MAC addresses. "Transparent" vì các hosts không biết nó tồn tại.

Bridge Address Learning:

  Frame arrives on port 1 from MAC AA:BB:CC:11:22:33

  Bridge records: AA:BB:CC:11:22:33 is on port 1

  Next frame TO AA:BB:CC:11:22:33:

  Bridge knows -> forward to port 1 only

  Unknown destination:

  Bridge floods to all ports except incoming
STP ngăn chặn loops trong switched networks bằng cách block một số links, tạo topology không vòng (tree).

STP election:

  1. Elect Root Bridge (lowest Bridge ID)

  2. Each non-root switch: find Root Port (shortest to root)

  3. Each segment: elect Designated Port

  4. Remaining ports: block (backup)

  Convergence time: 30-50 seconds (STP)

  RSTP (Rapid STP): < 1 second

rows: BCP38: ISP filter packets with invalid src IP
Gửi nhiều SYN, không hoàn thành handshake
Nhiều nguồn tấn công đồng thời
Ping broadcast với spoofed src IP (victim)
DNS/NTP amplify small request to large response
Limit open resolvers, rate limit UDP

blocks.text:
Network: 192.168.1.0/24 (256 IPs)

Need: 4 subnets

Solution: /26 (borrow 2 bits from host part)

  192.168.1.0/26:   .1  - .62   (62 hosts)

  192.168.1.64/26:  .65 - .126  (62 hosts)

  192.168.1.128/26: .129 - .190 (62 hosts)

  192.168.1.192/26: .193 - .254 (62 hosts)

VLSM (Variable Length Subnet Mask):

  Mix subnet sizes: /26 for large, /30 for P2P links

IP calculation:

  Network:   IP & Mask

  Broadcast: Network | ~Mask

  First host: Network + 1

  Last host:  Broadcast - 1
BGP là routing protocol của Internet, điều phối routing giữa các Autonomous Systems (AS). Được gọi là 'protocol của Internet'.

BGP concepts:

  Autonomous System (AS): group of networks under one admin

  AS Number: unique identifier (1-65535 public, 64512-65534 private)

  BGP Peer types:

  eBGP (external): between different ASes (e.g., your ISP)

  iBGP (internal): within same AS

  BGP Attributes for path selection:

  1. Weight (Cisco-specific, local)

  2. LOCAL_PREF (prefer one exit over another)

  3. AS_PATH (shortest = best)

  4. ORIGIN (IGP > EGP > incomplete)

  5. MED (suggest preferred entry to other AS)

  BGP is policy-based, not just shortest path

sections.name: Phần III — Backend Networking, Security, Modern (Q41–58)

blocks.text: CORS là cơ chế security của browser ngăn chặn JavaScript gọi APIs từ domain khác (cross-origin) mà không được phép.

CORS Preflight (OPTIONS):

  Browser                           API Server (api.example.com)

  Request to: http://app.other.com/data

    |

    +- OPTIONS /data HTTP/1.1 --------->

       Origin: http://app.other.com

       Access-Control-Request-Method: POST

    <-- HTTP/1.1 200 OK ----------------

        Access-Control-Allow-Origin: http://app.other.com

        Access-Control-Allow-Methods: POST, GET

        Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type

    +- POST /data HTTP/1.1 ------------>

    <-- 200 OK -------------------------

// Express CORS configuration

const cors = require('cors');

app.use(cors({

  origin: ['https://app1.com', 'https://app2.com'],

  methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE'],

  credentials: true  // allow cookies

  allowedHeaders: ['Content-Type', 'Authorization']

}));

*⚠️  CORS chỉ được enforce bởng browser. Server-to-server calls không bị CORS ảnh hưởng. Không dùng wildcard **'*****'** khi có credentials.*

JWT structure: header.payload.signature

  Header:  { 'alg': 'HS256', 'typ': 'JWT' }

  Payload: { 'sub': '1234567890', 'name': 'Dat',

             'iat': 1516239022, 'exp': 1516325422 }

  Signature: HMACSHA256(base64(header) + '.' + base64(payload), secret)

Stateless auth flow:

  1. User logs in -> Server generates JWT

  2. Client stores JWT (localStorage or httpOnly cookie)

  3. Each request: Authorization: Bearer <jwt>

  4. Server verifies signature -> extract user info

   (No DB lookup needed!)

JWT vs Session:

  JWT:     stateless, scalable, but can't revoke before expiry

  Session: stateful, revocable, but needs DB/Redis lookup

*💡 Bảo mật JWT: dùng httpOnly cookie (XSS safe), ngắn access token (15min), dùng refresh token. Không lưu sensitive data trong payload (chỉ base64, không encrypt).*

OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow:

  User    App (Client)    Auth Server    Resource Server

   |          |                |                |

   +- Login --+                |                |

              +--- Auth Code --+                |

              |    Request                      |

              +--- Code ------+                |

              +--- Token Req -+                |

              +<-- Access Token               |

              +------ API call with token ----->

              +<----- Protected resource --------

Flows:

  Authorization Code (+ PKCE): Web + Mobile apps

  Client Credentials: Server-to-server

  Implicit (deprecated): SPA (replaced by PKCE)

OpenID Connect (OIDC):

  = OAuth 2.0 + identity layer

  Returns ID Token (JWT) with user identity

  Used for: 'Login with Google/Facebook'

rows: Count requests in time window (e.g., 100 req/min)
Tokens added at rate, each req consumes 1

blocks.text:
HTTP Cache flow:

  Request 1:

    GET /api/products

    Response: 200 OK

    Cache-Control: max-age=300, public

    ETag: 'abc123'

  Request 2 (after 300s):

    GET /api/products

    If-None-Match: 'abc123'

    If unchanged:  304 Not Modified (no body, 0 bytes)

    If changed:    200 OK (new data + new ETag)

  Cache-Control directives:

  public:    CDN + browser can cache

  private:   only browser can cache

  no-cache:  must revalidate before serving

  no-store:  never cache

  max-age=N: fresh for N seconds

questions.q: WebSocket vs Server-Sent Events vs Long Polling?
Service Discovery và DNS trong Microservices?

blocks.text:
Service Discovery patterns:

  Client-Side Discovery:

    Client -> Service Registry -> get IP:Port -> call service

    Example: Netflix Eureka, Consul

  Server-Side Discovery:

    Client -> Load Balancer -> Registry lookup -> service

    Example: AWS ALB + Cloud Map

  DNS-Based (Kubernetes):

    payment-service.default.svc.cluster.local

    Kubernetes DNS resolves to ClusterIP

Kubernetes Service types:

  ClusterIP:    internal only (DNS within cluster)

  NodePort:     exposed on each node's port

  LoadBalancer: external LB (cloud provider)

  Headless:     no ClusterIP, direct Pod DNS

rows: Fake ARP replies, MITM on LAN

questions.q: TCP Flow Control và Congestion Control?

blocks.text:
TCP Flow Control (Receiver side):

  Receiver advertises Window Size in each ACK

  Sender can't send more than window size unacked

  Receive Window (rwnd): available buffer at receiver

  If rwnd = 0: sender stops until receiver notifies

TCP Congestion Control (Network side):

  Slow Start:

    cwnd = 1 MSS

    Double cwnd each RTT until ssthresh

  Congestion Avoidance:

    cwnd >= ssthresh: increase by 1 MSS per RTT

  Fast Retransmit:

    3 duplicate ACKs -> retransmit immediately

    ssthresh = cwnd/2, cwnd = ssthresh

  CUBIC (Linux default):

    Faster recovery, optimized for high-bandwidth
API Gateway là single entry point cho các microservices, xử lý các cross-cutting concerns.

Client (Web, Mobile, 3rd party)

        |

   [API Gateway]

   |  Authentication / Authorization (JWT, OAuth)

   |  Rate Limiting (429 Too Many Requests)

   |  Request Routing

   |  SSL Termination

   |  Load Balancing

   |  Request/Response Transformation

   |  Caching

   |  Logging + Tracing (X-Request-ID)

   |  Circuit Breaker

   |

   +-- /api/users     --> User Service :3001

   +-- /api/orders    --> Order Service :3002

   +-- /api/products  --> Product Service :3003

   +-- /api/payments  --> Payment Service :3004

Examples: Kong, AWS API Gateway, NGINX, Traefik

Problem: WebSocket connections are stateful

  User connects to Server A: WS connection

  Next request -> Load Balancer -> Server B?

  Server B doesn't have the WS connection -> ERROR!

Solution 1: Sticky Sessions (Session Affinity)

  LB routes same client to same server (IP hash)

  Problem: uneven load distribution

Solution 2: Shared Pub/Sub (Recommended)

  All WS messages go through Redis Pub/Sub

  Server A receives msg, publishes to Redis

  Server B subscribed to Redis -> forwards to connected clients

  [Client A] -> [Server A] -> [Redis Pub/Sub] -> [Server B] -> [Client B]

  Libraries: Socket.io + socket.io-redis-adapter
QUIC là transport protocol mới của Google, chạy trên UDP thay vì TCP. Cơ sở của HTTP/3.

rows: Không có separate TLS handshake overhead
Giữ kết nối khi đổi IP (WiFi -> 4G)
Per-stream, không block toàn bộ connection

label: Networking
